extortion.description: Sports South is a family company and these values permeate its culture to all its employees and its customers. Hard work, education, and hands-on involvement, along with the assured well-being and livelihood of hundreds of employees, reinforce the company’s dedication to its origin. As the country’s oldest and largest distributor of firearms, ammunition, and accessories, Sports South maintains its leadership position through the relentless pursuit of new ideas and new thinking to drive long-term success and growth. With the nation’s largest concentration of shooting sports inventory from all the leading manufacturers under one roof, Sports South can deliver unmatched distribution services to its customers.SITE: www.theshootingwarehouse.com Address : Sports South, LLC 101 Robert G. Harris Dr Shreveport, LA 71115 USAALL DATA SIZE: ~800gb 1. Department data 2. Human Resources 3. Accounting, payroll 4. Personal data & etc…
